title: Exemptions
doc_html:
§2455.  Exemptions

All high school and collegiate athletic programs in the state of Louisiana shall be exempt from the provisions of this Chapter.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 751, §2.

§2455.  Exemptions
All high school and collegiate athletic programs in the state of Louisiana shall be exempt from the provisions of this Chapter.
Added by Acts 1980, No. 751, §2.
